scripts.build: if [ -n "$VIRTUAL_ENV" ]; then python backend/manage.py collectstatic --noinput; elif command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --python 3.12 --with-requirements backend/requirements.txt python backend/manage.py collectstatic --noinput; else python backend/manage.py collectstatic --noinput; fi && npm --prefix frontend ci && npm --prefix frontend run build
